<!--
This issue is an INTAKE surface, not a source of truth. If accepted, a
maintainer (or you, via the opsx:propose workflow) turns this into a real
change under openspec/changes/<change-id>/ -- proposal.md, design.md,
tasks.md, and delta specs. Once that folder exists, this issue is either
closed in favor of the generated tracking issue, or linked to it.

See AGENTS.md and openspec/config.yaml for the full process.
-->
